response.justification: The candidate lacks direct experience in SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator hardware optimization, or deep-learning workload performance analysis — core requirements for the Principal Performance Architect role. Their background is heavily focused on full-stack web development, DevOps, and open-source tooling, with no evidence of low-level hardware-software co-design, GPU architecture, or AI accelerator optimization experience.
strengths: Strong full-stack engineering skills across multiple languages and platforms
Demonstrated open-source contributions and technical leadership in developer tooling
Experience with performance-critical systems and real-time data processing
concerns: No demonstrated experience with SoC, IP, or AI accelerator modeling
Lacks background in deep learning workload optimization or GPU architecture
Education is a BS in CS, but no evidence of 8+ years in hardware/performance-focused roles
